title: FL-SA: A Modular Testbed for Federated Learning with Secure Aggregation
description:
A modular testbed for Federated Learning (FL) enhanced with Secure Aggregation (SA), enabling privacy-preserving model training across distributed edge and IoT devices. Raw data remains local while model updates are securely masked during aggregation.

Features: pluggable cryptographic stacks (ASCON, PRESENT, AES-GCM), MQTT-based communication with mTLS security, Dockerized deployment, per-round performance metrics (latency, CPU, RAM, bandwidth), and a baseline FL mode for comparison.
